title: Automation Query - Delete Group When Empty

posts.author: stuvwxyz (Stuart)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m looking to implement Monday.com as our solution for our daily tasks.
I’ve created automations to create a new group of tasks in from our “Master” group which will give a staff their job list for the day. Then when tasks are completed, they are moved down out of the group.

I’d love for an automation that deletes a group when it is empty of tasks.

(Other solutions to my brief welcome )

Thanks,
Stuart
